lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. The exterior has significant body damage and rust. The interior shows heavy wear and staining. There are major mechanical issues that require immediate repair for the vehicle to be operable.
Fair condition.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been consistently well-maintained throughout its ownership. The engine runs smoothly and reliably, and the transmission shifts cleanly through all gears. While the exterior shows some minor signs of normal wear, like small stone chips on the hood, the paint still holds a great shine. The interior is clean and comfortable, with all electronic features and climate control systems functioning as intended. It’s a dependable car that’s ready for its next owner.

Get ready to be impressed by this absolute gem! This car is in pristine, mint condition and has been cared for with the utmost attention to detail. It looks and drives like it's brand new, with a flawless exterior and a spotless interior. This is a rare find for anyone seeking a vehicle in showroom quality!

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is free of any imperfections or damage. The interior is in pristine condition with no signs of use. Mechanically, the car is in perfect operating condition with no faults.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, having been meticulously maintained to the highest possible standards. The exterior is flawless, featuring original paint with a showroom shine and no scratches or dents. Inside, the cabin is immaculate, with all features and electronics functioning as new. Mechanically, it is perfect, with a complete service history and smooth performance that reflects its low-mileage, pampered life. This is a rare find for a buyer seeking a vehicle in truly pristine, showroom-quality condition.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a unit in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance. For the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering stands as a definitive benchmark in its class.

Hey there! You've seriously got to see this beauty. It is in absolutely pristine condition—honestly, it’s like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car from day one, so it’s spotless inside and out and drives like a total dream. If you’re looking for that perfect, like-new feel, this is definitely the one for you. Can't wait for you to take it for a spin!

Offered is an exceptional E46 M3, featuring the high-revving S54B32 inline-six power plant with its signature individual throttle bodies and double-VANOS variable valve timing. This example is equipped with the Getrag 420G six-speed manual transmission, delivering torque through a factory-spec variable M differential lock. The chassis integrity is superlative, having received proactive subframe reinforcement and a full refresh of the rear trailing arm bushings. The suspension maintains its original geometry with OEM Sachs dampers, and the braking system features ventilated rotors with firm pedal modulation. This vehicle presents in a true turnkey state, exhibiting a factory-fresh compression profile and zero mechanical oxidation, catering to the most demanding collector.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Inspection welcome.

Presenting a truly showroom-quality vehicle that satisfies even the most discerning collector. This car has been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage and has never seen inclement weather. The exterior paint is flawless, featuring a deep, mirror-like gloss with a professional ceramic coating and absolutely zero stone chips, dings, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-fresh condition; the premium leather upholstery shows no bolster wear, the carpets are pristine under original floor mats, and it retains that distinct new-car scent. Every electronic component, button, and sensor operates exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line. Mechanically, the car is perfect, backed by a comprehensive, binder-organized service history. It has recently undergone a preventative major service, including all fluid flushes and a new set of high-performance tires. Sold with both original keys, all manuals, and the original window sticker. This is a rare opportunity to own a preserved, investment-grade example.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an exacting standard, its aesthetic and mechanical condition is beyond reproach. The exterior retains its factory brilliance, while the interior remains in a showroom-fresh state, entirely free of any discernable wear. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this example stands as a definitive benchmark of its class, offering an unparalleled driving experience.

Presented in impeccable showroom condition, this vehicle exemplifies automotive excellence. Every surface, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a standard of care that is rarely encountered. This motorcar has undergone an exhaustive technical evaluation to ensure it meets our most stringent performance benchmarks. It is an acquisition for those who demand uncompromising quality and distinction.

Hey there! You have to see this absolute beauty! 🚗✨ I’ve babied this car since day one, and it is truly in mint condition—seriously, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor. It’s been kept spotless and runs like a dream. I'm so excited for someone else to get behind the wheel and enjoy it as much as I have! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offering a museum-grade E46 M3, this S54-powered masterpiece represents the pinnacle of analog performance. The 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six delivers linear power to a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual, supported by a proactively overhauled VANOS system and a reinforced rear subframe. Every mechanical component, from the M-Variable limited-slip differential to the factory-spec bushings, functions with surgical precision. The exterior retains its original deep luster with
One owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Original paint. Interior like new. Full service records included.

This vehicle is a breathtaking time capsule, meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled environment to maintain its showroom-fresh allure. The exterior paint is flawless, displaying a deep, mirror-like luster free from stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains pristine, with supple leather that retains its original scent and touch-sensitive controls that function with factory-new precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, benefiting from a comprehensive service history and preventative maintenance performed exclusively by marque specialists. Every detail, from the spotless undercarriage to the crispness of the gear shifts, confirms its status as a top-tier example. Offered with all original keys, manuals, and documentation, this is a rare opportunity for a collector to acquire a truly peerless machine that drives exactly as it did on day one.

Presenting an uncompromising example of automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in impeccable showroom condition, having been maintained to the highest possible standards. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, reflects a commitment to preservation. This is a rare acquisition for the discerning enthusiast seeking a turn-key experience in a vehicle of unparalleled caliber.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in showroom condition. Every aspect of this automobile reflects a commitment to excellence, from its flawless exterior finish to its pristine, smoke-free interior. Mechanically beyond reproach and aesthetically indistinguishable from new, this unit represents a premier acquisition for the most discerning collector.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor? This car is in absolute mint condition and has been babied since the day I got it. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person—seriously, you won't find a scratch on it! I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy this beauty. Come check it out and see for yourself!

Offering an exceptional E92 M3, a pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering. This specimen features the S65 4.0L V8 with an 8,400 RPM redline and individual throttle bodies, delivering razor-sharp induction response
Mint condition. Single owner. Full service history. No accidents. Garage kept.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that redefines the standard for a pre-owned masterpiece. This garage-kept specimen features a flawless exterior with deep, mirror-like paint clarity, free of any swirls, chips, or imperfections. The interior remains in showroom state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with zero bolster wear, and the cabin still retains that distinctive new-car scent. Every technological feature and mechanical component functions with factory precision, backed by a comprehensive, documented service history performed exclusively at authorized dealerships. Recently detailed and ceramic coated, this car has been maintained with an obsessive attention to detail that is evident in every corner, from the pristine engine bay to the untouched alloy wheels. For the buyer who demands perfection and a turn-key experience, this is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in showroom condition and offering an uncompromising standard of automotive excellence. Every aspect of this specimen, from its flawless exterior finish to its pristine interior appointments, reflects a legacy of meticulous preservation. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of peerless caliber.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained in an impeccable state that transcends typical pre-owned standards. This unit represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory luster. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure performance that mirrors its showroom-floor debut. For the discerning enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality, this offering stands as a definitive benchmark in its class.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, she is a total dream. This car is in truly stunning condition—it honestly looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered since day one, always kept in the garage and sparkling clean. You won’t find a single blemish or hiccup anywhere; it drives as smooth as silk. I'm looking for a new owner who will appreciate just how special and well-cared-for this beauty is. Come see it for yourself—you're going to fall in love!

Offering an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) Coupe featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six power plant with individual throttle bodies and a factory 8,000 RPM redline. This specimen is equipped with the desirable 6-speed Getrag 420G manual
Used car. Mint condition. No mechanical issues. Single owner. Clean title. Garage kept.

Step into automotive perfection with this impeccably maintained vehicle, presented in absolute showroom condition. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish, protected by a high-grade ceramic coating that highlights the flawless body lines without a single swirl mark or stone chip. Inside, the cabin remains in a 'time-capsule' state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of any wear, still carrying that distinct new-car scent. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver-assist features, functions with factory precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, having been serviced exclusively at certified dealerships with a comprehensive paper trail to prove its pampered life. It has been garage-kept since day one, never seeing rain or harsh weather. For the discerning buyer who refuses to compromise on quality, this is the finest example available on the market today. It drives as smoothly as the day it rolled off the assembly line—tight, responsive, and completely silent.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen exhibits a level of preservation rarely seen on the secondary market, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that remains in showroom state. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been rigorously vetted to ensure it meets the requirements of the most discerning collector. This is a definitive opportunity to acquire a vehicle of singular quality and pedigree.
